description: CONAC anti-corruption audit — declaration audit verification
legal_basis: FATF R.24 c.24.9; Cameroonian anti-corruption mandate — [CITATION NEEDED: cameroon-conac-mandate]

interactions.description: CONAC verifies a declaration's audit receipt against the Fabric anchor

match.note: true = the receipt hash in the projection matches the on-chain anchor; false = integrity violation

receipt_hash_hex.note: BLAKE3-256 hex of the canonical receipt bytes

interactions.description: Audit verifier returns match=false when the on-chain hash does not match the projection
interactions.note: This interaction documents the expected response for an integrity event — CONAC monitors for match=false as a signal of potential tampering.

mismatch_detail.note: Human-readable description of what differed; redacted of PII per OPS-2

interactions.description: CONAC reads a declaration's public lifecycle fields (state, lane, timestamps)

declarant_principal.note: Present for Tier A (CONAC) consumers; redacted for Tier B

beneficial_owners.note: Present for Tier A; Sovim-redacted (names/nationalities removed) for Tier B
